title: Department Manager Vacancy at Croma - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Croma - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Department Manager with drive and ambition, Croma in Vijayawada is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Croma:
Croma is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Category Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Croma!
